title: Target Darts — DE paid search review

transcript.speaker: Mar Castro
transcript.text: Quick recap on DE — last week's data is in. CPA on paid search is up 14% week-over-week, primarily on brand terms. Display is flat. SEO clicks are down 6% but conversion rate held.

transcript.speaker: Chris Bennett
transcript.text: The brand term thing is annoying. What's driving it?

transcript.speaker: Mar Castro
transcript.text: Two things. We've got increased bid competition from a new entrant — looks like Winmau ramped up Q2 — and our landing pages are still using the old hero. The conversion rate on the new hero variant is 23% higher in our test cohort.

transcript.speaker: Chris Bennett
transcript.text: OK. Let's roll out the new hero across DE this week. Lukas can you sign off on the German copy?

transcript.speaker: Lukas Weber
transcript.text: Yes, I'll have it back to you by Friday. The copy team has the brief.

transcript.speaker: Mar Castro
transcript.text: Good. One more thing — the German search behavior data shows users typing 'alarmanlage' way more than 'alarmsysteem'. Our ad copy is split 60/40 the wrong way. I want to flip it and run a 2-week test, then make it permanent if CTR holds.

transcript.speaker: Chris Bennett
transcript.text: Wait, this is the dartboard market — does that even apply here?

transcript.speaker: Mar Castro
transcript.text: Yeah sorry, wrong example. Same pattern though — there's a German vernacular term users actually search for that we're under-bidding on. I'll send you the keyword set. The test runs from May 1, and we'll have data by May 15.

transcript.speaker: Chris Bennett
transcript.text: Fine. I want to see results before we go above €40k on this test.

transcript.speaker: Mar Castro
transcript.text: Understood. Initial budget €15k, scale if CTR is +20% or better at the midpoint check. I'll own this end-to-end.

transcript.speaker: Lukas Weber
transcript.text: What about Austria? We've been wanting to expand south.

transcript.speaker: Chris Bennett
transcript.text: Park Austria until June. We need to nail DE first. I don't want to spread thin.

transcript.speaker: Mar Castro
transcript.text: Agreed. One open question — do we have the legal sign-off on the new creative? The agency flagged something about the prize claim language.

transcript.speaker: Chris Bennett
transcript.text: I'll check with our counsel today. Should have an answer tomorrow.
